message: Audited 2 target files (significados-curados-helpers.test.ts 176L + significados-curados.test.ts 296L); 0 actionable tech_debt markers found. The only 'TODO' substring matches are inside the const name 'TODOS_PILARES' (legitimate variable meaning 'all pillars' in PT-BR). No commits required — files already clean per prior cycle audits (N+30 refactor work also touched this code). Single weak 'placeholder' match is a test assertion comment ('// Não pode ser placeholder genérico') describing the invariant, not a TODO marker.
notes: ast_grep not installed in this env (used grep fallback). Both target files are post-F-219/F-220 refactor test code and have no actionable tech debt. 'TODOS_PILARES' const is a legitimate variable name, not a TODO comment.
